/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest_tests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest_tests.dir/tests/test_rolling_stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest_tests.dir/tests/test_spike_detection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest_tests.dir/tests/test_portfolio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest_tests.dir/tests/test_max_drawdown.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest_tests.dir/tests/test_execution.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest_tests.dir/tests/test_sweep_grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest_tests.dir/tests/test_sweep_analysis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest_tests.dir/src/csv_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest_tests.dir/src/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest_tests.dir/src/execution.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kalshi_backtest_tests.dir/src/sweep.cpp.o -o kalshi_backtest_tests
